articles.title: France suspends extra EU border checks at Dover after hours-long queues
articles.description: The Port of Dover said the new entry and exit system would be suspended, after travellers faced heavy queues while temperatures soared.

articles.title: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
articles.description: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

articles.title: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend
articles.description: Amber heat health alerts are in place for the Midlands, eastern and south-east England.

articles.title: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
articles.description: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.
